selected_dialects.reason: Flange is rotationally symmetric: revolve outer profile, center bore, and two concentric bolt circle patterns (outer 24x M18 PCD340, inner 12x M12 PCD200 at 15° start angle).
Two independent bolt hole ring patterns on the same flange body require boolean cut composition from separately defined hole pattern placements.
